message:
perf(runtime): cap stealer skip-list to inline capacity + full-scan wheel levels

- local_queue.rs: add skipped_locals.len() < SKIPPED_LOCALS_INLINE_CAP
  guard to the work-stealing loop so that when the stealer has already
  skipped the maximum inline-storable number of local tasks, it stops
  early rather than spilling the SmallVec to the heap
- time/wheel.rs: replace single-slot next_occupied_circular() scan with
  a full bitmap word-by-word scan across all occupied slots in each
  level, ensuring next_deadline() finds the true minimum deadline
  rather than only checking the first occupied slot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
